vw_kessy_early_serial_eeprom.locksmith_name: Early / non-encrypted KESSY serial EEPROM type
vw_kessy_early_serial_eeprom.official_module_name: Access/Start Authorization Control Module - exact designation vehicle dependent
vw_kessy_early_serial_eeprom.encryption: commonly described by locksmiths as non-encrypted; exact implementation requires evidence
warnings: Do not remove an IC until orientation is photographed and a verified backup plan exists.
A stable in-circuit read must be repeated and compared before it is trusted.

vw_kessy_late_encrypted_board.official_module_name: Access/Start Authorization Control Module - exact designation vehicle dependent
vw_kessy_late_encrypted_board.encryption: encrypted locksmith classification; exact cryptographic implementation must be documented per hardware revision
warnings: Never select an adapter from vehicle year alone.
Confirm supply voltage, ground and pin orientation before connecting a programmer.
Back up all readable areas before key preparation or data modification.
